long_summary: The text you asked about — “146.0.3856.109” — makes sense once you look at the surrounding page content from your open Edge Settings tab. It’s not a random number; it’s part of the Microsoft Edge version information displayed on the About Microsoft Edge settings page.
key_points: The text you asked about — “146.0.3856.109” — makes sense once you look at the surrounding page content from your open Edge Settings tab. It’s not a random number; it’s part of the Microsoft Edge version information displayed on the About Microsoft Edge settings page.
